# CLS — Classification / legibility

Genus: **Claritas**

Whether the viewer and platform can classify the topic.

| ID | Scientific-style name | Area | Hypothesis | Metric | Method |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| H114 | *Claritas topica* var. h114-accounts-repeated-topic | Niche-setting | Accounts with repeated topic pillars get stronger classification than accounts posting unrelated tips. | SEA | M-SVT |
| H275 | *Claritas captionis* var. h275-repeating-exact-problem | Classification | Repeating one exact problem phrase across speech, overlay and caption improves topic coherence. | MIX | M-SVT |
| H276 | *Claritas topica* var. h276-mixed-topic-underperform | Classification | Mixed-topic videos underperform single-promise videos when the audience is cold. | MIX | M-SVT |
